scripts.verify: npm run verify:sharing && npm run verify:native
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:add:ios: npm run build && npx cap add ios
scripts.cap:add:android: npm run build && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:open:ios: npm run build && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:open:android: npm run build && npx cap open android
